title: CISA Known Exploited Vulnerabilities (sample subset for AegisSOC demo)

vulnerabilities.vulnerability_name: Zerologon Netlogon Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.short_description: Netlogon Remote Protocol (MS-NRPC) improperly handles the authentication of ephemeral keys, allowing an attacker to impersonate a domain controller.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Apply updates and enforce secure RPC per Microsoft guidance.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Plausible privilege-escalation path a domain-admin-credentialed attacker could use to reach SRV-DC01 during lateral movement.

vulnerabilities.short_description: Windows Print Spooler service improperly performs privileged file operations, allowing remote code execution.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Apply updates, disable Print Spooler on domain controllers if not required.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Common post-exploitation privilege escalation vector on unpatched file/print servers.

vulnerabilities.vulnerability_name: Apache Log4j2 Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (Log4Shell)
vulnerabilities.short_description: JNDI lookups in Log4j2 allow remote code execution via crafted log messages.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Upgrade to a patched Log4j2 version and audit for exploitation attempts.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Relevant to internet-facing services running on SRV-APP01/SRV-WEB01 and containerized workloads in the k8s cluster.

vulnerabilities.vulnerability_name: Microsoft Outlook Elevation of Privilege Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.short_description: A specially crafted email with an extended MAPI property triggers NTLM credential leak without user interaction.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Apply updates; block outbound SMB (TCP 445) at the perimeter.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Zero-click credential theft vector relevant to the email-borne initial access surface represented by email_phishing.jsonl.

vulnerabilities.short_description: Memory corruption in the Equation Editor component allows arbitrary code execution when a malicious document is opened.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Apply updates; disable/remove the legacy Equation Editor component.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Legacy alternative to macro-based execution for the same phishing-attachment initial access stage.

vulnerabilities.vulnerability_name: Atlassian Confluence OGNL Injection Remote Code Execution Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.short_description: Unauthenticated OGNL injection allows remote code execution on Confluence Server/Data Center.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Apply updates immediately or restrict network access to the application.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Representative internet-facing application-tier exposure for SRV-APP01.

vulnerabilities.vulnerability_name: Microsoft Exchange Server Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (ProxyLogon)
vulnerabilities.short_description: Server-side request forgery in Exchange Server allows an attacker to bypass authentication and execute code.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Apply updates; hunt for webshells dropped via prior exploitation.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Relevant to SRV-EXCH01 mail infrastructure exposure.

vulnerabilities.vulnerability_name: Windows Remote Desktop Services Remote Code Execution Vulnerability (BlueKeep)
vulnerabilities.short_description: Remote Desktop Services allows unauthenticated remote code execution via a crafted RDP session.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Apply updates; disable RDP from untrusted networks; enable NLA.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Relevant to RDP-based lateral movement patterns tracked by SIGMA-AEGIS-0006.

vulnerabilities.vulnerability_name: Citrix Bleed Sensitive Information Disclosure Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.short_description: Buffer overread allows session token theft, enabling session hijacking and MFA bypass.
vulnerabilities.required_action: Apply updates and terminate all active/persistent sessions after patching.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Illustrates session-token-theft style MFA bypass, conceptually related to the no-MFA CloudTrail rule (SIGMA-AEGIS-0011).

vulnerabilities.vulnerability_name: Apache Log4j2 Denial of Service and RCE Vulnerability
vulnerabilities.short_description: Incomplete fix for CVE-2021-44228 in certain non-default configurations allows RCE/DoS.
vulnerabilities.relevance: Follow-on patch-management tracking item for the same Log4Shell exposure surface.
